versions.title: Smarter suggestions, full-word tashkeel, and a friendlier UI (release candidate before v1.0)
items: Way smarter suggestions. A big dictionary upgrade means common words like tab3an (طبعاً), 7abibi (حبيبي), and insha2allah (إن شاء الله) land on top from the very first try, even when you spell them in shorthand.

One-tap tashkeel for a whole word. Press Ctrl+T (or ⌘+T on Mac) with your cursor at the end of a word to add all the diacritics in one go. Select a single letter and only that letter gets the marks — same shortcut, smarter behavior.
Edit any word by clicking it. Click a committed word in the preview to re-open it for editing. No more backspacing through everything to fix one word.
Starter words on the empty screen. The empty-widget view shows your go-to phrases. ↵ pastes, Tab drops the phrase into the input so you can keep typing.
Numbers convert to Arabic-Indic. Type 2026 → ٢٠٢٦. Press Tab on the suggestion to keep the English form. Single bare digits (3, 7) still mean ع / ح.
Two-letter swap. Select two adjacent letters in the input, then Ctrl+G (or ⌘+G) to pick alternates for both at once.
Per-letter tashkeel picker. Ctrl+T on a selected letter shows every diacritic option — fatha, kasra, damma, sukun, shadda combos, tanween.
Shortcut hints when you need them. Highlight any letter and a small hint appears showing the swap and tashkeel shortcuts. Dismiss it once and it won't come back.
All shortcuts in one place. Settings now has a Shortcuts page listing every keyboard shortcut, with the right key icons for Windows and Mac.
Reset to a fresh start. A new Reset app button under Settings → System wipes everything Franconvert has learned about you, so you can start over or hand the app to someone else.
Cleaner picker. Removed some redundant labels in the letter and tashkeel pickers so you can focus on the choices.

versions.title: Letter picker — swap a single Arabic letter without retyping
items: Press <kbd>Cmd</kbd>+<kbd>G</kbd> (or <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>G</kbd>) on a suggestion to open a letter picker.
Pick a different Arabic letter for any ambiguous Latin consonant (z → ز/ظ/ذ, t → ت/ط/ث, etc.).
Use <kbd>Tab</kbd> to cycle between letter positions, arrows to choose, <kbd>Enter</kbd> to apply.
Your choice is locked to the suggestion and survives further edits to the rest of the word.
Confirmed picks are remembered, so next time the right spelling shows up first.
